spec.name: Mind Transform Sphere
spec.summary: reconfigures mind energy in a spherical envelope by creating a fresh flux expression
spec.effect_description: The caster inscribes a sigil that reconfigures mind energy in a spherical envelope by creating a fresh flux expression. Effect range: long. Persistence: conditional.
